trigger: Inbound email with claim form or missing document notice
current_pain: Manual triage delays high-value claims and creates inconsistent follow-up paths.

ai_tasks.name: Classify claim intent
ai_tasks.control_point: Confidence threshold below 0.82 routes to manual review.

ai_tasks.name: Draft document request
ai_tasks.control_point: Only approved templates can be used for outbound drafting.

human_checks.name: Escalation validation
human_checks.control_point: Supervisor approves all high-value or sensitive cases.

outputs.name: Claims routing payload
outputs.control_point: Payload must include traceable reason codes.

current_pain: Vendor onboarding is slowed down by duplicate checks, missing data and fragmented approvals.

ai_tasks.name: Check completeness and risk flags
ai_tasks.control_point: Risk flags must be explainable for finance review.

ai_tasks.name: Prepare approval summary
ai_tasks.control_point: Summary is restricted to internal stakeholders only.

human_checks.name: Finance approval gate
human_checks.control_point: Any banking data mismatch requires manual sign-off.

outputs.name: Onboarding decision packet
outputs.control_point: Decision packet must include ownership and next-step SLA.
